summary: Peer micro-transfer P0+P1+P2 into Fabric worktree m5-peer-micro-transfer: using-fabric pre-action gating, altitude body lint, pasteable store UX, archive-as-truth narrative, CLI signposts, doctor --probe JSON readiness, light finish→archive cadence, and P2 diagnostic polish (consistency audit + path-drift warn + related graph readability). Explicitly excludes mem0 auto-memory, GitNexus code KG, Spex/Trellis/EagleRAG/SDD main loops, and Obsidian vault UI.
approach: Ship in three waves matching priority. Wave 1 (P0) hardens agent discipline and operator recovery on existing seams (bootstrap/skills, extractKnowledge quality gates, first-hit/store actionHint). Wave 2 (P1) adds narrative + CLI infrastructure (docs/bootstrap archive-as-truth, tombstone signposts, doctor --probe, soft finish→archive). Wave 3 (P2) batches diagnostic readability polish without new product surfaces. Every task reuses grounded patterns (FabricError.actionHint, summary opacity guards, first-hit remediations, fabric-hint archive_edit_threshold, doctor warn-only lints). pending→review remains the only path to canonical; hooks stay nudge-not-gate (KT-DEC-0007).

stages: P0 gate agent edits + propose quality + store recovery UX
P1 document archive-as-truth + signposts + probe readiness + soft cadence

design_decisions: Wave order hard-locked: P0 → P1 → P2 (ralph boundary)
KT-DEC-0007: Hook=nudge not permanent gate — no decision:block for missing fab_recall or archive
pending→review remains the only path to canonical (no mem0-style auto-promote)
Altitude lint default warn; propose-gate opt-in via FABRIC_ALTITUDE_PROPOSE_GATE or fabric-config altitude_propose_gate; dump-shape markers not pure length
CLI signposts are tombstones only — no silent aliases for retired names
doctor --probe reuses assessFirstHit readiness oracle; does not run --fix pipeline
finish→archive is light skill/bootstrap cadence; archive_edit_threshold default stays 20; not a task engine
P2-8/9/11 batched into one task to minimize agent spawns

OUT OF SCOPE (do not implement): mem0 auto-memory into canonical; GitNexus-class code knowledge graph; Spex session dashboard / Trellis task PRD / EagleRAG stack / SDD main loop; Obsidian vault UI; replacing multi-repo dogfood as sole mainline; P2-10 pure validation without code (document only)
Minimal diffs; match existing code style; each P0 item requires ≥1 behavior test or e2e assertion
Post-check serialization: Wave1 TASK-002→TASK-003 (i18n); Wave2 TASK-001→TASK-004→TASK-007 (bootstrap)
out_of_scope: Spex session dashboard / Trellis task PRD / EagleRAG stack / SDD main loop
replacing multi-repo dogfood as sole mainline
P2-10 pure validation without code (document only)

patterns: extractKnowledge summary opacity guards (summary_too_short / summary_equals_slug / summary_looks_like_stable_id) + secret_detected refuse-with-empty-pending_path
doctor health+fix only; audit group for cite/metrics/retired
fabric-hint.cjs archive_edit_threshold default 20 soft Stop nudge
retired command comments in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts (metrics→audit metrics, context→inspect)
conventions: TypeScript ESM, pnpm filters @fenglimg/fabric-cli / fabric-server / fabric-shared
doctor lint codes snake_case knowledge_* / related_graph_*
minimal diffs; no unsolicited docs beyond task scope

pressure_pass.notes: dump-shape markers not pure length; dual fixtures; default warn + opt-in gate
